category_sources: Official Mapnik GitHub organization describes Mapnik as an open source toolkit for developing mapping applications.
source_facts.description says Mapnik is a toolkit for developing mapping applications.
display_name_sources: Official project site and repository use the capitalized display name Mapnik.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is the project wiki documentation surface referenced by the official repository.
Official mapnik.org docs page points users to the Wiki and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Mapnik docs describe the project as the core of geospatial visualization and processing.
